immersive_aircraft.fat.out: You are too hungry to fly!
immersive_aircraft.gyrodyne_target_reach: Minimum rotor speed reached, ready for takeoff!
immersive_aircraft.invalid_dimension: This aircraft does not work in this dimension.
option.immersive_aircraft.crashDamage: Damage the player on a crash.
option.immersive_aircraft.damagePerHealt: Higher values make aircraft more durable.
option.immersive_aircraft.dropInventory: Drop the inventory, instead of saving it within the aircraft item.
option.immersive_aircraft.dropUpgrades: Drop the upgrades and customization, instead of saving it within the aircraft item.
option.immersive_aircraft.healthBarRow: Offset the health bar of vehicles.
option.immersive_aircraft.preventKillThr: Will not kill the player on a crash.
option.immersive_aircraft.regenerateHeal: Automatically regenerates health every given tick, simulating vanilla behavior.
option.immersive_aircraft.requireShiftFo: Only repair when holding shift, otherwise just enter the vehicle.
option.immersive_aircraft.separateCamera: Use a separate camera in aircraft.
option.immersive_aircraft.showHotbarEngi: Render the engine gauge over the hotbar.
option.immersive_aircraft.useCustomKeybi: Use multi-keybindings, may break certain mods.
option.immersive_aircraft.useThirdPerson: Defaults to third person camera in aircraft.
option.immersive_aircraft.weaponsAreDest: Allow some weapons to destroy blocks.
